2605.24305.title: ChaosBench-Logic v2: Evaluating LLM Logical Reasoning over Dynamical Systems at Scale
2605.24305.paper_summary: Standard accuracy on binary reasoning benchmarks hides critical failure modes: prior collapse, inconsistency under paraphrase, and inability to reason about parameter-dependent dynamics. We present ChaosBench-Logic v2, a 40,886-question benchmark over 165 dynamical systems with 27 FOL predicates and 78 axiom edges, together with CARE (Calibration- and Adversarial-Robust Evaluation), a protocol that surfaces these pathologies. Evaluating 14 models, we find that regime-transition reasoning remains near random (MCC = 0.05) even for frontier models, whereas FOL deduction with given premises reaches MCC = 0.52. Per-family decomposition shows that the proprietary-model advantage concentrates on cross-indicator (+0.40) and consistency tasks, while open-source Qwen 2.5-32B dominates indicator diagnostics (0.91 vs. 0.45). Two models exhibit negative MCC on bifurcation questions, confirmed as systematic anti-correlation via confusion-matrix analysis.
2605.24305.paper_summary_zh: 標準的二元推理基準上的準確性隱藏了關鍵的失敗模式：先前崩潰、在意義重述下的不一致性，以及對參數依賴動態的推理能力不足。我們提出了ChaosBench-Logic v2，這是一個包含40,886個問題的基準，涵蓋165個動態系統，擁有27個一階邏輯（FOL）謂詞和78條公理邊，並且還有CARE（校準和對抗穩健評估），這是一個揭示這些病態的協議。對14個模型的評估顯示，即使對於前沿模型，體制轉換推理仍然接近隨機（MCC = 0.05），而給定前提的FOL推導達到了MCC = 0.52。按家庭分解顯示，專有模型的優勢集中在跨指標（+0.40）和一致性任務上，而開源的Qwen 2.5-32B在指標診斷上佔據主導地位（0.91對0.45）。兩個模型在分岔問題上顯示出負的MCC，通過混淆矩陣分析確認為系統性的反相關。
2605.24305.author: Noel Thomas et.al.
